titleStmt.title: Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 604

p.seg: William, by the grace of God king of the Scots, to justices, sheriffs, officials, and all worthy men of his entire land, greeting.

I command and resolutely instruct that none of you unlawfully maintain any of the tenants of the prior of Coldingham in opposition to the prior himself or in opposition to his house; but that he do to him that which by reason he ought to do.
As witnesses: Earl David, my brother; Hugh, my chancellor; Earl David.
